prestazioni: Engine: VQ35DE (Rev-Up variant, 306hp stock) with a fully built internals package including JE 9.5:1 forged pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-S billet crankshaft for 8,500 RPM reliability. Paired with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Tomei, targeting 550whp on E85 with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing fueling via ID1000 injectors and a Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) with 4.083 final gear ratio in a Nismo 6-speed transmission, reinforced with a PPG straight-cut 1st and 2nd gear set. Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with a lightweight aluminum flywheel for rapid engagement under boost.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear). Polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension replace all OEM rubber, and the front subframe is reinforced with a Cusco strut tower bar and a Stillen front lower tie bar for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Body: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (3.5-inch flares front, 4-inch rear) and a Rocket Bunny V2 rear diffuser. Front bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed ABS unit featuring integrated DRLs and a 30mm lower splitter from APR Performance. Carbon fiber hood from Seibon with a 3-inch cowl scoop for turbo heat extraction.

Aero: Custom 1,200mm x 350mm GT wing by 9 Lives Racing, mounted on carbon fiber pedestals with adjustable angle of attack (0-18 degrees). Side skirts from the Veilside kit are extended with custom carbon fiber canards, and the rear quarter panels feature functional air vents to reduce lift.

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +15 front and 19x12 +20 rear wheels, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear). Custom 5mm spacers on the rear hubs for aggressive poke, with BC Racing BR coilovers set to a 1.5-inch drop from stock ride height.
